name: Herbed Brown Rice and Chicken
recipeIngredient: 14.5 oz Natural Goodness chicken broth, can
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, cook chicken for 10 minutes or until browned.
2. Sprinkle with garlic powder and pepper. Set aside.
3. Stir in broth and thyme. Heat to a boil.
4. Stir in rice. Reduce heat to low. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Return chicken to the pan. Add peas.
6. Cover and cook for another 5 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink and the rice is done.
7. Remove chicken. Stir cheese into the rice mixture.
Makes 4 servings - 317 calories - 6 grams fat
